meta.name: Luxe Beauty
meta.description: A soft, minimal beauty and cosmetics store with a pastel pink aesthetic. It features a clean, centered layout, high-quality editorial photography, and delicate typography, targeting a modern, feminine demographic.

header.notes: Logo and store name are dead center. Nav links are centered below the logo. Icons for user, search, cart, wishlist are on the right. Country/currency selector on the left.

footer.notes: Minimal footer with social icons centered above a horizontal list of utility links, followed by legal links and copyright.

productCard.notes: Images have a light grey background with rounded top corners. Bottom content area is white. Badges (e.g., '+8 shades', 'best seller') appear in top corners. Star ratings, product name, subtitle, and price are shown below the image.

productGrid.notes: Standard 4-column grid for featured products, but shown as horizontal scrollable carousels in some sections.

featuredProducts.notes: Presented as a horizontal carousel with left/right arrows outside the grid.

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Full-width single column, text overlay on the left

design.background: Full-bleed lifestyle photograph with a soft pink tone
design.text: White uppercase bold heading, dark body text
design.styling: No borders, full width, text content vertically centered on the left

content.headline: Bold promotional headline for a specific product category
content.body: Short supporting sentence describing the product benefit
content.cta: Single white button with dark text, square corners (0rem), lowercase text

media.description: Woman applying makeup, soft pink background, editorial style

sections.notes: Classic hero image with left-aligned text box and CTA.

sections.name: product-carousel

design.styling: Cards with soft rounded top corners, padding around the carousel

media.description: Various cosmetic products on light grey backgrounds

content.items: [{image: 'product shot', title: 'product name', subtitle: 'product type', price: 'price', rating: 'stars', badges: ['shades', 'status']}]
content.specialElements: Left and right navigation arrows placed outside the product row.

sections.notes: Used multiple times to showcase different product collections.

sections.name: promo-banner
sections.layout: 2-column grid, 50/50 split, image left text right

design.background: White background for text area, image on left
design.text: Dark foreground, prominent pink text for the offer
design.styling: No borders, slight gap between image and text area

content.headline: Prominent promotional offer in bold pink text
content.body: Description of the offer and terms
content.cta: Single white button with dark border and text, square corners (0rem), lowercase text

media.description: Crochet tote bag hanging on a door handle

sections.notes: Used to highlight a specific promotion or gift with purchase.

sections.name: image-grid

design.styling: Images have rounded corners (0.5rem), varying aspect ratios

media.description: Mix of product shots, lifestyle images, and close-up textures

content.specialElements: A large '+' icon centered below the grid, possibly to load more.

sections.notes: Looks like an Instagram feed or visual inspiration board.

sections.name: newsletter

design.styling: Simple form with input and submit button side-by-side

content.headline: Call to action to sign up for updates
content.cta: Single white button with dark border and text, square corners (0rem), lowercase text 'submit'

sections.notes: Input field has square corners, light background, dark border.
